name_en: 🌷Includes original green box packaging🌷【New Arrival】GG Marmont Ultra Mini Bag
name_cn:
🌷Includes original green box packaging🌷【New Arrival】GG Marmont Ultra Mini Bag
From mirror leather to sparkling crystals, Gucci celebrates the gifting season with dazzling pieces. Choose printed accessories or glossy leather wallets to inject vitality into your look. This GG Marmont Ultra Mini bag is crafted with silver metallic leather. Silver metallic V-shaped leather, silver-tone hardware, cotton-linen blend lining, includes key charm that can be attached separately, double-G, chain shoulder strap (60cm long), weight: approx. 0.35kg
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, AirPods, card holder, and lipstick
Model: 476433
Dimensions: 16.5(L) x 10(H) x 4.5cm(D)
Color: Silver full leather/Original leather
Italian creation
